errEscapePath: Invalid path: cannot escape the docs directory
infoExtensionIgnored: ℹ️ Extension already present, ignoring the mdx flag
infoRenamed: ℹ️ A file with that name already exists, renamed to: {filename}
usage:
Usage:

new-doc "directory" "filename" title=xxx/description=xxx/order=1/mdx:T

or:

new-doc "directory" "filename"\
 title=xxx\
 description=xxx\
 order=1\
 mdx:T

Directory and filename must be the first two positional arguments.
The rest are optional and separated by /.
ownRepoSkip: ℹ️ Own repository detected, skipping postinstall
notStarlight: ℹ️ @astrojs/starlight dependency not detected, skipping script setup
alreadyManagedSkip: ℹ️ {path} already exists and is managed by this package, skipping
tookOver: ✅ Found an existing script with the same purpose, took it over: {path}
fixedDocsDirNote: ℹ️ Docs directory is fixed to src/content/docs (Starlight convention, not changeable)
